revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:三河七福神]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: 新規作成
revision.text:
'''三河七福神'''（みかわしちふくじん）は、[[愛知県]][[三河国|三河地方]]の7つの[[寺院|寺]]により構成されている[[七福神]]の[[巡礼]][[札所]]。
== 概要 == *開創年：[[1979年]] *エリア：[[岡崎市]]、[[碧南市]]、[[蒲郡市]]、[[豊川市]]、[[西尾市]]、[[吉良町]] *期間：通年
==七福神の所在== *[[法蔵寺 (岡崎市)|法蔵寺]]（岡崎市） - [[えびす|恵比須]] *[[安楽寺 (蒲郡市)|安楽寺]]（蒲郡市） - [[大黒天]] *[[宝福寺]]（岡崎市） - [[福禄寿]] *[[三明寺]]（豊川市）- [[弁才天]] *[[妙福寺 (碧南市)|妙福寺]]（碧南市） - [[毘沙門天]] *長圓寺（西尾市） - [[布袋人]] *宝珠院（吉良町） - [[寿老人]]
==関連項目== *[[吉田七福神]]
==外部リンク== *[http://www.aruku88.net/7fuku/04mikawa/index.html 参考サイト]
{{DEFAULTSORT:みかわしちふくしん}} {{Japan-culture-stub}} [[Category:七福神]] [[Category:民間信仰]] [[Category:名数|7 しちふくしん]] [[Category:縁起物]] [[category:神仏習合]] [[Category:愛知県の寺]]

== 概要 == *開創年：[[1979年]] *エリア：[[岡崎市]]、[[碧南市]]、[[蒲郡市]]、[[豊川市]]、[[西尾市]] *期間：通年
== 三河七福神の一覧 == *[[法蔵寺 (岡崎市)|法蔵寺]]（岡崎市） - [[えびす|恵比須]] *[[安楽寺 (蒲郡市)|安楽寺]]（蒲郡市） - [[大黒天]] *[[宝福寺 (岡崎市)|宝福寺]]（岡崎市） - [[福禄寿]] *[[三明寺]]（豊川市） - [[弁才天]] *[[妙福寺 (碧南市)|妙福寺]]（碧南市） - [[毘沙門天]] *[[長圓寺 (西尾市)|長圓寺]]（西尾市） - [[布袋]] *[[宝珠院 (西尾市)|宝珠院]]（西尾市） - [[寿老人]]
== 関連項目 == *[[吉田七福神]]
== 外部リンク == *[http://www.aruku88.net/7fuku/04mikawa/index.html 参考サイト]{{リンク切れ|date=2016年11月}}
{{Japan-culture-stub}}
{{citation needed:みかわしちふくしん}} [[Category:七福神めぐり]] [[Category:愛知県の寺|*みかわしちふくしん]] [[Category:mass imported shinto cult pages needing dummy edit for attribution and to be reviewed if a redirect and jawiki link reviewing]][[ja:三河七福神]][[Category:qq]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:三河七福神]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11356185]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:10, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} == Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods == '''Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods''' (三河七福神, Mikawa Shichifukujin) is a pilgrimage route consisting of seven [[:en:Buddhist temple|temples]] in the [[:en:Mikawa Province|Mikawa Province]] region of [[:en:Aichi Prefecture|Aichi Prefecture]], dedicated to the [[:en:Seven Lucky Gods|Seven Lucky Gods]].
== Overview == * Founded: [[:en:1979|1979]] * Area: [[:en:Okazaki, Aichi|Okazaki]], [[:en:Hekinan|Hekinan]], [[:en:Gamagōri|Gamagōri]], [[:en:Toyokawa, Aichi|Toyokawa]], [[:en:Nishio|Nishio]] * Open: Year-round
== List of Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods == * {{ill|Hōzō-ji (Okazaki)|ja|法蔵寺 (岡崎市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōzō-ji (Okazaki)|qq=|1=Hozo-ji (Okazaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555343}} (Okazaki) - {{ill|Ebisu|ja|恵比須|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to えびす (曖昧さ回避)}} * {{ill|Anraku-ji (Gamagōri)|ja|安楽寺 (蒲郡市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anraku-ji (Gamagōri)|qq=|1=Anrakuji (Gamagōri)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450873}} (Gamagōri) - [[:en:Daikokuten|Daikokuten]] * {{ill|Hōfuku-ji (Okazaki)|ja|宝福寺 (岡崎市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfuku-ji (Okazaki)|qq=|1=Hofuku-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22120280}} (Okazaki) - [[:en:Fukurokuju|Fukurokuju]] * {{ill|Sanmyō-ji|ja|三明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanmyō-ji|qq=|1=Sanmyoji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355522}} (Toyokawa) - [[:en:Benzaiten|Benzaiten]] * {{ill|Myōfuku-ji (Hekinan)|ja|妙福寺 (碧南市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōfuku-ji (Hekinan)|qq=|1=Myofuku-ji (Hekinan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11446984}} (Hekinan) - [[:en:Vaiśravaṇa|Bishamonten]] * {{ill|Chōen-ji (Nishio)|ja|長圓寺 (西尾市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōen-ji (Nishio)|qq=|1=Chōen-ji (Nishio)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q57068234}} (Nishio) - [[:en:Budai|Hotei]] * {{ill|Hōju-in (Nishio)|ja|宝珠院 (西尾市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōju-in (Nishio)|qq=|1=Houshu-in Temple (Nishio)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452627}} (Nishio) - [[:en:Jurōjin|Jurōjin]]
== See Also == * {{ill|Yoshida Seven Lucky Gods|ja|吉田七福神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshida Seven Lucky Gods|qq=}}

== Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods ==
'''Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods''' (三河七福神, Mikawa Shichifukujin) is a pilgrimage route consisting of seven {{ill|Buddhist temple|en|Buddhist temple|WD=Q5393308|lt=temples}} in the {{ill|Mikawa Province|en|Mikawa Province|WD=Q768158|lt=Mikawa Province}} region of {{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|WD=Q80434|lt=Aichi Prefecture}}, dedicated to the {{ill|Seven Lucky Gods|en|Seven Lucky Gods|WD=Q846858|lt=Seven Lucky Gods}}.

== Overview ==
* Founded: {{ill|1979|en|1979|WD=Q2484|lt=1979}}
* Area: {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|en|Okazaki, Aichi|WD=Q242783|lt=Okazaki}}, {{ill|Hekinan|en|Hekinan|WD=Q495802|lt=Hekinan}}, {{ill|Gamagōri|en|Gamagōri|WD=Q694930|lt=Gamagōri}}, {{ill|Toyokawa, Aichi|en|Toyokawa, Aichi|WD=Q389495|lt=Toyokawa}}, {{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}
* Open: Year-round

== List of Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods ==
* {{ill|Hōzō-ji (Okazaki)|ja|法蔵寺 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōzō-ji (Okazaki)|1=Hozo-ji (Okazaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555343}} (Okazaki) - {{ill|Ebisu|ja|恵比須|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to えびす (曖昧さ回避)}}
* {{ill|Anraku-ji (Gamagōri)|ja|安楽寺 (蒲郡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anraku-ji (Gamagōri)|1=Anrakuji (Gamagōri)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450873}} (Gamagōri) - {{ill|Daikokuten|en|Daikokuten|WD=Q1759916|lt=Daikokuten}}
* {{ill|Hōfuku-ji (Okazaki)|ja|宝福寺 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfuku-ji (Okazaki)|1=Hofuku-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22120280}} (Okazaki) - {{ill|Fukurokuju|en|Fukurokuju|WD=Q780797|lt=Fukurokuju}}
* {{ill|Sanmyō-ji|ja|三明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanmyō-ji|1=Sanmyoji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355522}} (Toyokawa) - {{ill|Benzaiten|en|Benzaiten|WD=Q818468|lt=Benzaiten}}
* {{ill|Myōfuku-ji (Hekinan)|ja|妙福寺 (碧南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōfuku-ji (Hekinan)|1=Myofuku-ji (Hekinan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11446984}} (Hekinan) - {{ill|Vaiśravaṇa|en|Vaiśravaṇa|WD=Q866315|lt=Bishamonten}}
* {{ill|Chōen-ji (Nishio)|ja|長圓寺 (西尾市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōen-ji (Nishio)|1=Chōen-ji (Nishio)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q57068234}} (Nishio) - {{ill|Budai|en|Budai|WD=Q599838|lt=Hotei}}
* {{ill|Hōju-in (Nishio)|ja|宝珠院 (西尾市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōju-in (Nishio)|1=Houshu-in Temple (Nishio)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11452627}} (Nishio) - {{ill|Jurōjin|en|Jurōjin|WD=Q389611|lt=Jurōjin}}

* Founded: {{ill|1979|en|1979|WD=Q2484|lt=1979}}
* Area: {{ill|Okazaki, Aichi|en|Okazaki, Aichi|WD=Q242783|lt=Okazaki}}, {{ill|Hekinan|en|Hekinan|WD=Q495802|lt=Hekinan}}, {{ill|Gamagōri|en|Gamagōri|WD=Q694930|lt=Gamagōri}}, {{ill|Toyokawa, Aichi|en|Toyokawa, Aichi|WD=Q389495|lt=Toyokawa}}, {{ill|Nishio|en|Nishio|WD=Q317844|lt=Nishio}}
* Open: Year-round

== List of Mikawa Seven Lucky Gods ==
* {{ill|Hōzō-ji (Okazaki)|ja|法蔵寺 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōzō-ji (Okazaki)|1=Hozo-ji (Okazaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11555343}} (Okazaki) - {{ill|Ebisu|ja|恵比須|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to えびす (曖昧さ回避)}}
* {{ill|Anraku-ji (Gamagōri)|ja|安楽寺 (蒲郡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Anraku-ji (Gamagōri)|1=Anrakuji (Gamagōri)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11450873}} (Gamagōri) - {{ill|Daikokuten|en|Daikokuten|WD=Q1759916|lt=Daikokuten}}
* {{ill|Hōfuku-ji (Okazaki)|ja|宝福寺 (岡崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hōfuku-ji (Okazaki)|1=Hofuku-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q22120280}} (Okazaki) - {{ill|Fukurokuju|en|Fukurokuju|WD=Q780797|lt=Fukurokuju}}
* {{ill|Sanmyō-ji|ja|三明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sanmyō-ji|1=Sanmyoji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11355522}} (Toyokawa) - {{ill|Benzaiten|en|Benzaiten|WD=Q818468|WD=Q818468|lt=Benzaiten}}
* {{ill|Myōfuku-ji (Hekinan)|ja|妙福寺 (碧南市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myōfuku-ji (Hekinan)|1=Myofuku-ji (Hekinan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11446984}} (Hekinan) - {{ill|Vaiśravaṇa|en|Vaiśravaṇa|WD=Q866315|lt=Bishamonten}}
* {{ill|Chōen-ji (Nishio)|ja|長圓寺 (西尾市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chōen-ji (Nishio)|1=Chōen-ji (Nishio)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q57068234}} (Nishio) - {{ill|Budai|en|Budai|WD=Q599838|lt=Hotei}}
